Hero.title: This dream didn't start today
Hero.subtitle: It started many years ago in the hands of those who taught us to work, believe and love. Today Antica M&M honors that timeless legacy.
Hero.home_hero_subtitle1: It started many years ago in the hands of those who taught us to work, believe and love. Today Antica M&M honors that timeless legacy.
Hero.home_hero_subtitle2: Live unforgettable moments with our premium coffee and exclusive experiences.
Hero.home_hero_subtitle3: Discover our selection of high-quality products to bring the flavor of Antica home.

About.boxSubtitle: Antica M&M, an experience that transcends time
About.boxText:
Antica M&M was not born to sell coffee.

It was born to preserve the legacy of those who taught us to work, believe and love.

Each cup tells a story of dedication and unparalleled quality.
About.bodyParagraph1: From the heights of the Colombian Andes, where coffee grows in harmony with nature, Antica M&M represents the pure essence of the coffee tradition.
About.bodyParagraph2: Our passion for coffee goes beyond the product; it is a celebration of culture, family and the roots that unite us as a community.
About.finalQuote: Coffee is not just a drink, it is a bridge between generations, a bond that connects the past with the present.

ExperienciasPage.title: Experiences
ExperienciasPage.subtitle: Discover unique moments
ExperienciasPage.emptyState: No experiences available at the moment.

Spaces.title: Our Spaces
Spaces.description: Discover the unique environments that make Antica a special place to enjoy unforgettable moments.
Spaces.heroSubtitle: Environments designed to create memorable experiences

space1.title: Main Hall
space1.description: Our main space combines elegance and comfort. With natural lighting, wooden furniture and details that evoke the warmth of the traditional coffee house.

space2.title: Outdoor Terrace
space2.description: An outdoor oasis where the aroma of coffee mixes with the fresh breeze. Perfect for enjoying a good book or a quiet conversation.

space3.title: Events Area
space3.description: Versatile space for special celebrations, coffee tastings, workshops and corporate events. Modern design with capacity for different configurations.

space4.title: Beverage Atelier
space4.description: Our workshop dedicated to the creation and experimentation of unique beverages. A creative space where innovation meets coffee tradition.

space5.title: Romantic Spaces
space5.description: Intimate and cozy environments perfect for special moments. Soft lighting, tables for two and an atmosphere that invites romance.

space6.title: Parking
space6.description: Safe and convenient parking for our visitors. Spacious area with 24-hour surveillance for greater peace of mind.

Chef.title: Our Chef
Chef.description: Meet the master behind our specialized cuisine, dedicated to creating unique culinary experiences.
Chef.heroSubtitle: Passion for cuisine that transforms each dish into a work of art

space1.title: Chef's Biography
space1.description: Discover our chef's culinary journey, from his beginnings to becoming the heart of Antica. A story of dedication and love for gastronomy.

space2.title: Specialties
space2.description: Signature dishes created with fresh ingredients and innovative techniques. Each bite tells a story of flavor and creativity.

space3.title: Culinary Philosophy
space3.description: The vision that guides our kitchen: fusion of traditions, constant innovation and respect for the authentic flavors of each ingredient.

PetFriendly.title: Pet Friendly
PetFriendly.tooltip: Your furry friends are welcome! We have comfortable spaces and fresh water for them.
